Key.English: Player Combat Support (Transport)
Transport Module for ALiVE Combat Support
Key.Chinesesimp: 用于ALiVE战斗支援的运输模块

Key.English: Place the module and sync it to a Player Combat Support module.
Callsign
Enter the Callsign, ensure that it is unique
Key.Chinesesimp: 输入呼号,确保它是唯一的

Key.English: Transport Vehicle Type
Pick the vehicle from the list of suitable classes across all loaded factions (use the Side button to narrow the list). Type a classname into the Override field for vehicles the list doesn't show.
Custom Vehicle Classname:
Optional override. Type any vehicle classname to use instead of the selection above - when filled it always wins. Use this for vehicles the list doesn't show. Leave empty to use the selection.
Spawn Height (m ASL)
Spawn height above sea level, for carrier decks (e.g. the Nimitz addon). Values of 0 or below spawn the asset on the ground.
Code
Code run on the spawned vehicle; use "this" to reference it. Statements separated by ; run independently.
Slingloading
Enables the Slingload and Unhook tasks. Automatically disabled if the vehicle cannot slingload. Containers are controlled by Number of Containers below.
Number of Containers
Number of slingloadable containers spawned near the helicopter (spawns regardless of the Slingloading setting).
Use Military Logistics Simulation

When enabled, this asset will request resupply from LOGCOM when ammo, fuel, or damage thresholds are reached. Each resupply draws from the Military Logistics force pool - the same pool used for OPCOM reinforcements. Requires a Military Logistics module.
Logistics Source
Static: resupply dispatched from LOGCOM base position. Dynamic: dispatched from nearest friendly-held objective.
